name: Jess Morales Rocketto, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Shh...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
| Friend --

I run the digital organizing team here at Hillary for America, so it's my job to think about ways to make it easier for rock-star supporters like you to get involved in this campaign!

That’s why I’m so excited about the launch of our brand new call app -- and we’re looking for supporters to be the first to try it out. Because you've signed up to volunteer, I thought you might be a good candidate. **[Would you be interested in taking it for a test drive?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU2NTY2NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNjQ2MjE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

This app is just what it sounds like -- accessible from a computer, it gives you all the information you need to make calls and help Hillary! We’re not launching it to the public yet, but I think it’s going to be one of the most important things we build in this election, and I can’t wait for you to see it. Every bit of data we have lets us know that calling supporters is one of the most effective ways to make sure people turn out on Election Day. It's these calls that have helped Hillary earn more votes than any candidate on either side of the aisle throughout this primary.

**We’re counting on our most trusted team members like you to be the first to poke around and let us know how you like it -- are you in? There are a limited number of accounts, so sign up now to be part of our beta group and we'll be in touch:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU2NTY2NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNjQ2MjE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Jess

Jessica Morales Rocketto
Digital Organizing Director
Hillary for America

| | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU2NTY2NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNjQ2MjE0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU2NTY2NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNjQ2MjE0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjU2NTY2NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNjQ2MjE0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU2NTY2NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNjQ2MjE0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU2NTY2NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNjQ2MjE0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU2NTY2NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNjQ2MjE0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU2NTY2NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNjQ2MjE0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjU2NTY2NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNjQ2MjE0S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU2NTY2NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNjQ2MjE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU2NTY2NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNjQ2MjE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: It wasn't easy, but she stepped up
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
It's no secret that when we started this campaign, we had no money, very little name recognition, and **we were taking on the entire Democratic establishment in this country.**
So when a Democratic National Committee vice chair, Congresswoman Tulsi Gabbard, was disinvited from our first debate after calling for more of them, people took notice. **And when Tulsi quit her post at the DNC to endorse our campaign, it sent shockwaves through the political establishment.**
For the last several months, Tulsi has been a tireless surrogate for our campaign. She has joined me at rallies, appeared in ads, and now we're campaigning across **California where almost every recent poll shows us within just a few points of Hillary Clinton.**
Today, I want to ask you to join me in accomplishing two goals: **help us win in Californiaon Tuesday and ensure Congresswoman Tulsi Gabbard is re-elected in November.**
[**Split a $2.70 contribution between our campaign and Tulsi Gabbard 's re-election, and we will have the resources we need to win in California on Tuesday while supporting a great progressive leader we need in Congress.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tulsi-gabbard?refcode=em160604-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tulsi-gabbard?refcode=em160604-full")
Congresswoman Gabbard is one of the important voices of a new generation of leaders. As a veteran of the Iraq War, she understands the cost of war and is fighting to create a foreign policy that not only protects America but keeps us out of perpetual wars that we should not be in.
Tulsi has been a great friend to our political revolution. And because of people like her, and people like you, we have a great chance to win California on Tuesday night and close this primary out strong. That's why splitting your contribution today is so important.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tulsi-gabbard?refcode=em160604-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tulsi-gabbard?refcode=em160604-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Team Maggie
subject: Stand up for reproductive rights (petition enclosed)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd352/2a380d31/13ad6328/f809f7/374869091/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd352/2a380d31/13ad6328/f809f7/374869091/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd352/2a380d31/13ad6328/f809f0/374869091/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://www.signforgood.com/WholeWomansHealth/?code=Hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264") The Supreme Court is about to deliver a decision in _Whole Woman's Health vs. Hellerstedt_ , a case that could set a precedent that would allow anti-choice Republican politicians (like Kelly Ayotte and Donald Trump) to undermine _Roe vs. Wade_.
Still short a justice since Republicans in Congress won't do their jobs, the Court could let Texas's most dangerous anti-choice law continue to deny health care access to hundreds of thousands of women. (Remember Wendy Davis's famous filibuster? It's that law.)
[**We know that you won't give up on supporting women's health care rights. That's why we need you to be one of the 8,000 signatures we're gathering to make sure the Supreme Court and Congress hear us loud and clear. Sign today.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd352/2a380d31/13ad6328/f809f0/374869091/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://www.signforgood.com/WholeWomansHealth/?code=Hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
This case brings into focus why the future of the Supreme Court is so critical. Kelly Ayotte not only supports Donald Trump, but she also wants to let him fill the Supreme Court vacancy, giving the GOP exactly what they need to roll back women's rights -- we can't afford to let this happen.
[**Join Maggie and put your name down to tell Kelly Ayotte that we trust women to make health care decisions for themselves and their families.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd352/2a380d31/13ad6328/f809f0/374869091/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://www.signforgood.com/WholeWomansHealth/?code=Hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thanks for your support.

-- Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd352/2a380d31/13ad6328/f809f1/374869091/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160604_WWH_btn&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd352/2a380d31/13ad6328/f809f2/374869091/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

Still short a justice since Republicans in Congress won't do their jobs, the Court could let Texas's most dangerous anti-choice law continue to deny health care access to hundreds of thousands of women. (Remember Wendy Davis's famous filibuster? It's that law.) "" This case brings into focus why the future of the Supreme Court is so critical. Kelly Ayotte not only supports Donald Trump, but she also wants to let him fill the Supreme Court vacancy, giving the GOP exactly what they need to roll back women's rights -- we can't afford to let this happen. name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Here’s the timeline:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
About to make history | Friend --

If we all do our jobs right, we’re coming up fast on the day when Hillary will clinch this nomination.

And that’s a big deal -- not just because, you know, we’re making history here -- but because then we’re able to focus all of our attention and talents on the threat that Donald Trump poses to the country.

**[If you’re ready to win this nomination once and for all, I hope you’ll chip in today to help make it happen -- so that Hillary knows you have her back right now when it counts so much. (You’ll also get a free bumper sticker to celebrate this historic moment!)](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU2NTg1MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzA3NjY4S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Donald Trump knows exactly how to launch an attack against Hillary, which is why this campaign having to divide its attention is such a dream scenario for him. If we lock down this nomination, we change the game and give Hillary an opportunity to do what she does best: bring people together.

And if we work to give her the chance, Hillary is going to build the strongest coalition this party has ever seen to beat Donald Trump this November, but all that starts with finishing this primary on a high note.

**Can you help? With just a few days to go, we’re counting on you right now:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU2NTg1MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzA3NjY4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than 1.3 million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU2NTg1MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzA3NjY4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU2NTg1MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzA3NjY4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU2NTg1MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzA3NjY4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU2NTg1MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzA3NjY4S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU2NTg1MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzA3NjY4S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU2NTg1MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzA3NjY4S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU2NTg1MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzA3NjY4S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU2NTg1MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzA3NjY4S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU2NTg1MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzA3NjY4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: About to make history | Friend -- If we all do our jobs right, we’re coming up fast on the day when Hillary will clinch this nomination. And that’s a big deal -- not just because, you know, we’re making history here -- but because then we’re able to focus all of our attention and talents on the threat that Donald Trump poses to the country. Donald Trump knows exactly how to launch an attack against Hillary, which is why this campaign having to divide its attention is such a dream scenario for him. If we lock down this nomination, we change the game and give Hillary an opportunity to do what she does best: bring people together. And if we work to give her the chance, Hillary is going to build the strongest coalition this party has ever seen to beat Donald Trump this November, but all that starts with finishing this primary on a high note. Can you help? With just a few days to go, we’re counting on you right now: Thanks, Christina Christina Reynolds Deputy Communications Director Hillary for America | Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than 1.3 million grassroots donors standing with her: | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House). Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: The first to see our potential
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
When we started our campaign, we had the support of hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters beginning to build the movement that we know today. **And the first member of Congress who saw the potential of our political revolution was Congressman Ra ul Grijalva.**
Raul was the very first member of Congress to endorse our campaign, and he did so proudly. He is a progressive leader in Congress who's not afraid to stand up to the political establishment.
**And now, as we enter the final primaries of the campaign, I will be campaigning in California with my friend Ra ul Grijalva by my side once more.** He is the exact kind of progressive hero we need in Congress, and that's why, with the polls so close, I need to ask you to help us win.
[**Split a $2.70 contribution between our campaign and Ra ul Grijalva's re-election, and we will have the resources we need to win in California on Tuesday while supporting a great progressive leader we need in Congress.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/raul-grijalva?refcode=em160604-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/raul-grijalva?refcode=em160604-full")
When we faced some of the most disingenuous attacks in our primary, it was Raul who was out in front with the media to defend our campaign. It was Raul who helped organized young Latinos in states across the country. And it's Raul's solid progressive vision that we need to continue to have in Congress.
Every single poll in California shows it's going to be extremely close. **That's why Ra ul is spending the last days before this primary right by my side, earning every vote we can.**
We need your help now to win California, and Raul needs your help to win his re-election to Congress in November.
[**Split a $2.70 contribution between Bernie 2016 and Ra ul Grijalva's re-election campaign and help us both win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/raul-grijalva?refcode=em160604-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/raul-grijalva?refcode=em160604-full")
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/raul-grijalva?refcode=em160604-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/raul-grijalva?refcode=em160604-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
